title: Unexpected %Warning-WIDTHTRUNC when RHS is 'bx
body:
### Can you please attach an example that shows the issue

```
module wild_expand(output  logic [4:0]    wild);
assign wild = 'bx;
endmodule
```

[expand-size.sv.txt](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/23018328/expand-size.sv.txt)

### What output from that test indicates it is wrong

```
%Warning-WIDTHTRUNC: expand-size.sv:2:13: Operator ASSIGNW expects 5 bits on the Assign RHS, but Assign RHS's CONST '?32?bxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx' generates 32 bits.
                                        : ... note: In instance 'wild_expand'
    2 | assign wild = 'bx;
```

### What 'verilator' command line do we use to run your example?

```
verilator -cc  expand-size.sv 
```

### What 'verilator --version' are you using?

```
Versions:
    gcc (GCC) 15.2.1 20250808 (Red Hat 15.2.1-1)
    Verilator 5.040 2025-08-30 rev v5.040
```
